pred_sql: SELECT school_district FROM FINREV_FED_17 WHERE state_code = (SELECT State_Code FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 WHERE State = 'Wisconsin') ORDER BY t_fed_rev DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT AVG(c14) AS average_title_1_fund FROM FINREV_FED_17 WHERE state_code = (SELECT State_Code FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 WHERE State = 'Virginia')

SELECT f.State, AVG(n.average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score, 
SUM(fr.t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_revenue 
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 AS n 
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS f 
ON n.state = f.State 
JOIN FINREV_FED_17 AS fr 
ON fr.state_code = f.State_Code 
GROUP BY f.State 
ORDER BY avg_math_score DESC, total_fed_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;

SELECT f.school_district, f.state_code, n.state, n.average_scale_score 
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f 
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 n ON f.state_code = n.state
WHERE f.t_fed_rev = (SELECT MAX(t_fed_rev) FROM FINREV_FED_17) OR
      f.c14 = (SELECT MAX(c14) FROM FINREV_FED_17) OR
      f.c25 = (SELECT MAX(c25) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
SELECT state FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 ORDER BY average_scale_score DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.school_district, MAX(f.t_fed_rev / n.average_scale_score) AS highest_ratio
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 n ON f.yr_data = n.year AND f.state_code = (
    SELECT state_code FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 WHERE State = n.state)
GROUP BY f.school_district
ORDER BY highest_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.State, n.average_scale_score FROM (SELECT fk.State, SUM(ff.t_fed_rev) AS total_revenue FROM FINREV_FED_17 ff JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 fk ON ff.state_code = fk.State_Code GROUP BY fk.State ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1) AS f JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 n ON f.State = n.state WHERE n.year = SOME_YEAR
-- Unable to construct SQL query because there's no direct relationship between school districts revenue and average scores in the provided schema.

WITH StateRevenue AS (SELECT f.State, SUM(ff.t_fed_rev) AS TotalRevenue FROM FINREV_FED_17 ff JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 f ON ff.state_code = f.State_Code GROUP BY f.State) SELECT r.State, r.TotalRevenue, n.average_scale_score FROM StateRevenue r JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 n ON r.State = n.state WHERE r.TotalRevenue = (SELECT MIN(TotalRevenue) FROM StateRevenue);

FROM sampledata15 sd
JOIN resultsdata15 rd ON sd.sample_pk = rd.sample_pk
WHERE sd.year = '15'
GROUP BY rd.commod
ORDER BY total_residue DESC
LIMIT 10;

ORDER BY avg_concentration DESC;

SELECT CASE 
            WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 THEN '1990s' 
            WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN '2000s' 
         END AS decade, 
       SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS total_acres_burned

GROUP BY decade;

SELECT p.birth_city, p.birth_state, p.birth_country, COUNT(pa.award_id) AS award_count FROM player_award pa JOIN player p ON pa.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.birth_city, p.birth_state, p.birth_country ORDER BY award_count DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(*) AS num_hall_of_famers FROM player p JOIN hall_of_fame h ON p.player_id = h.player_id WHERE h.inducted = 'Y' GROUP BY p.birth_country ORDER BY num_hall_of_famers DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT pa.award_id, pl.player_id, pl.name_first, pl.name_last, (pa.year - pl.birth_year::integer) as age_at_award FROM player_award pa JOIN player pl ON pa.player_id = pl.player_id WHERE pa.year IS NOT NULL AND pl.birth_year IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pa.award_id, pl.player_id, pl.name_first, pl.name_last, age_at_award ORDER BY pa.award_id, age_at_award LIMIT 1;

SELECT pa.award_id, p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, MAX(pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INT)) AS max_age FROM player_award pa JOIN player p ON pa.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY pa.award_id, p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last HAVING MAX(pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INT)) = (SELECT MAX(pa2.year - CAST(p2.birth_year AS INT)) FROM player_award pa2 JOIN player p2 ON pa2.player_id = p2.player_id WHERE pa2.award_id = pa.award_id);

SELECT s.team_id, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hall_of_fame_players_count
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN salary s ON h.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hall_of_fame_players_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

WHERE inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1
